examples: We always giggled about J we used our word for jackass.
The teen fought off competition from Black Swan, Jackass, Inception and 127 Hours to win his first MTV Award.
A U. S. company was taken by surprise when it introduced its product in Latin America and learned that the name meant "jackass oil" in Spanish.
Dukes of Hazzard did pretty well at the box office last year starring the guy from Jackass, Stifler and a pop singer as the Dukes family.
The MTV show Jackass, which aired from 2000 to 2002, popularized the idea of doing crazy, self-injuring stunts and pranks and taping them for entertainment.
